description: 目標語系文法進階層任務包：功能導向 grammar unlock 與先修 DAG

tasks.desc: Define grammar progression contract driven by functional outcomes.
Define prerequisite DAG schema for grammar unlock rules.
Map grammar nodes to function IDs and pattern IDs by level.
Integrate progression constraints into generator sequencing.
Implement gate checks for prerequisite violations.
Pilot sequencing on KO A1/A2 path and review regressions.
